text: **Speaker 1:** Hello, I'm Dr.
**Speaker 1:** Jill.
**Speaker 1:** Welcome to Let's Learn English with Anna.
**Speaker 1:** In the past, {computers|コンピューター} were really {big|大きい/巨大な}, but today they can fit in our hand.
**Speaker 1:** And they are getting {faster|速い} and {smarter|賢い}.
**Speaker 1:** So computers are always {changing|変化する} and they help us in many ways.
**Speaker 1:** How do you use computers?
**Speaker 1:** Today, Anna answers that question, how do you use computers?
**Speaker 2:** Oh hi!
**Speaker 2:** Welcome to my {treehouse|ツリーハウス}.
**Speaker 3:** Anna, our question is, how do you use computers?
**Speaker 2:** Max, you are a computer.
**Speaker 2:** You help me with the show.
**Speaker 2:** I use my {laptop|ノートパソコン} to work.
**Speaker 2:** I use my phone to {text|メッセージを送る} and to call people.
**Speaker 2:** I use an {exercise|運動/エクササイズ} app to count my steps.
**Speaker 3:** You walked a thousand steps yesterday.
**Speaker 3:** I need to walk more.
**Speaker 3:** Do not walk now.
**Speaker 3:** Try my new {video game|ビデオゲーム} app.
**Speaker 3:** I {downloaded|ダウンロードする} it to your phone.
**Speaker 2:** Max, I do not like to play video games.
**Speaker 3:** But my game is fun.
**Speaker 3:** Please try it.
**Speaker 2:** Okay.
**Speaker 2:** I will play your video game later.
**Speaker 2:** I {promise|約束する}.
**Speaker 2:** And tomorrow I will walk 10,000 steps, I promise.
**Speaker 1:** Anna uses {technology|技術} for many things, but not to play video games.
**Speaker 1:** She will play Max's new game later or in the future.
**Speaker 1:** We use {Will|意志/未来|/wɪl/|I will help you.} to talk about future actions.
**Speaker 1:** Will lets us make {promises|約束|/ˈprɒmɪsɪz/|I promise to help you.} and {guesses|推測/予想|/ɡesɪz/|I guess it will rain.} about what is going to happen.
**Speaker 1:** Let's watch.
**Speaker 1:** Later, I will {play|遊ぶ/演奏する|/pleɪ/|Let's play a game.} your game.
**Speaker 2:** Tomorrow I will {walk|歩く|/wɔːk/|I walk to school.} 10,000 steps.
**Speaker 1:** Now let's go back to Anna.
**Speaker 1:** She {teaches|教える|/tiːtʃɪz/|I teach English.} us more about the word will.
**Speaker 2:** Sometimes we need to talk about the future.
**Speaker 2:** Using Will, I can {guess|推測する|/ɡes/|I guess you are right.} the future.
**Speaker 2:** Tomorrow I think it will {rain|雨が降る|/reɪn/|It will rain today.}
**Speaker 2:** Using will, I can make a promise for the future.
**Speaker 2:** I will do better in {school|学校|/skuːl/|I go to school.}
**Speaker 2:** Earlier, I promised to play Max's video game.
**Speaker 2:** I will play your video game later.
**Speaker 2:** I like the music.
**Speaker 2:** Oh, the {colors|色|/ˈkʌlərz/|I like bright colors.} are pretty.
**Speaker 3:** I think you will like it
**Speaker 1:** Anna is playing Max's video game.
**Speaker 1:** Will she like it?
**Speaker 1:** Will she win?
**Speaker 1:** Keep watching!
**Speaker 1:** But now let's hear from some friends.
**Speaker 1:** They answer the question, how do you use {computers|コンピューター|/kəmˈpjuːtərz/|I use computers for work.}?
**Speaker 1:** Listen for computer and {technology|技術|/tekˈnɒlədʒi/|New technology is amazing.} words.
**Speaker 4:** I like {texting|メッセージを送る|/ˈtekstɪŋ/|I am texting my friend.} my friends on my phone.
**Speaker 4:** I like to play video games on my {tablet|タブレット|/ˈtæblət/|I use a tablet for reading.}.
**Speaker 4:** Oh no, the {internet|インターネット|/ˈɪntərnɛt/|I use the internet every day.} is down, I have zero {connection|接続|/kəˈnɛkʃən/|My internet connection is slow.}.
**Speaker 1:** Thanks guys
**Speaker 1:** They shared how they use computers.
**Speaker 1:** For me, I sometimes work {online|オンライン|/ˈɒnlaɪn/|I work online from home.}, so I need a good internet connection.
**Speaker 1:** And I love {taking|撮る/する|/ˈteɪkɪŋ/|Taking photos is fun.} {selfies|自撮り写真|/ˈsɛlfi/|Selfies are popular now.}
**Speaker 1:** Now we will go back to Anna.
**Speaker 1:** She is {playing|遊ぶ/プレイする|/ˈpleɪɪŋ/|Playing games is enjoyable.} Max's {video game|ビデオゲーム|/ˈvɪdioʊ geɪm/|Video games are entertaining.}
**Speaker 1:** What will happen next?
**Speaker 1:** I love this game.
**Speaker 1:** I will play all day.
**Speaker 4:** Where is Anna?
**Speaker 3:** She is in my video game.
**Speaker 3:** Look.
**Speaker 3:** Run, Anna.
**Speaker 3:** Run!
**Speaker 3:** Anna, you are {bad|悪い/下手な|/bæd/|Bad players lose the game.}
**Speaker 3:** I think you will play tomorrow.
**Speaker 2:** No, no, no.
**Speaker 2:** Tomorrow I will take a walk for my 10,000 {steps|歩数/歩き|/stɛps/|Take 10,000 steps daily.}
**Speaker 1:** {Computers|コンピューター|/kəmˈpjutərz/|Computers help us work.} are useful, but remember to use {technology|技術|/tɛkˈnɑlədʒi/|Technology changes quickly.} carefully.
**Speaker 1:** And practice talking about computers with the words you learned on Let's Learn English with Anna.
